mdSummary:
# Spinner

Indeterminate loading spinner with size variants.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/spinner

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Spinner | Size | `SpinnerSize` | `SpinnerSize.Default` |  |
| Spinner | Variant | `SpinnerVariant` | `SpinnerVariant.Ring` |  |
| Spinner | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Spinner | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| Spinner | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Spinner | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

- (none)

- (none)

- (none)

## Example

```razor
<Spinner />
```
